name: SA Sample - Anomaly Watcher
brief: Sample: AI anomaly detection on Business Central G/L entries via scheduled scan.
description: A Job Queue–runnable codeunit periodically asks a Smart Agent to flag anomalies in recent G/L entries. Each finding becomes a row on an Anomaly Findings list for humans to triage. A working blueprint for AI-driven monitoring and audit assistance in D365 BC — proactive ERP intelligence beyond what Microsoft Copilot exposes out of the box.
